subcodes.title: Words to Isobel Chamberlain spoken around Sept. 1913
subcodes.first_line: I have great hopes for the American people, but alas! as yet they do not understand the teachings of Bahá'u'lláh
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @outward and inward meanings, @symbolism, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @literal interpretation
